Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client of the Azad engineering office.

nameEn.description: The full name of the client in English.

nameAr.description: The full name of the client in Arabic.

isActive.description: Whether the client's file is active.

Department.title: Department
Department.description: Represents a department in the company (e.g., Architectural, Structural).

nameEn.description: The name of the department in English.

nameAr.description: The name of the department in Arabic.

Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: Represents an engineer or employee linked to Firebase Authentication.

userId.description: The UID from Firebase Authentication for this user.

nameEn.description: The full name of the employee in English.

nameAr.description: The full name of the employee in Arabic.

departmentId.description: A reference to the document ID in the 'departments' collection.

hourlyRate.description: The cost rate per hour for this employee in KWD.

clientId.description: A reference to the document ID in the 'clients' collection.

nameEn.description: The name of the project in English.

nameAr.description: The name of the project in Arabic.

status.description: The current status of the project.

CashReceipt.title: Cash Receipt
CashReceipt.description: Represents a cash receipt voucher to track revenue from clients.

clientId.description: The ID of the client making the payment.

projectId.description: Optional ID of the project this receipt is for.

receiptDate.description: The date the payment was received.

clientNameEn.description: Automatically populated client name in English.

clientNameAr.description: Automatically populated client name in Arabic.

projectNameEn.description: Optional automatically populated project name in English.

projectNameAr.description: Optional automatically populated project name in Arabic.

TimeCost.title: Time Cost
TimeCost.description: Represents the actual cost of time spent by an employee on a project.

employeeId.description: The ID of the employee who spent the time.

projectId.description: The ID of the project worked on.

date.description: The date the work was performed.

hourlyRate.description: The employee's hourly rate at the time of work.

clientId.description: Auto-populated: The client associated with the project.

employeeNameEn.description: Auto-populated: The employee's name in English.

employeeNameAr.description: Auto-populated: The employee's name in Arabic.

departmentNameEn.description: Auto-populated: The department's name in English.

departmentNameAr.description: Auto-populated: The department's name in Arabic.

projectNameEn.description: Auto-populated: The project's name in English.

projectNameAr.description: Auto-populated: The project's name in Arabic.

/clients/{clientId}.description: Stores client profiles for the Azad engineering office.

/employees/{employeeId}.description: Stores employee data, including their department and hourly rate.

/projects/{projectId}.description: Stores information about individual engineering projects.

/cashReceipts/{cashReceiptId}.description: Tracks all incoming cash flow from clients for projects or general payments.

/timeCosts/{timeCostId}.description: Tracks the actual cost incurred by employees working on various projects.
